title: Sweet Comfortable Potato Stir-fry
description: An earthy and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring hoisin sauce, tender potatoes, and a touch of sweetness without added sugars.

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.amount: a small piece of fresh ginger

ingredients.name: water or chicken broth
ingredients.amount: as needed to make a slurry

instructions: Peel and thinly slice the potato. Chop the onion into small pieces.
Slice the ginger finely for easy incorporation into the stir-fry.
Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add sliced potatoes, onions, and ginger to the wok. Stir-fry until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Mix together hoisin sauce, soy sauce, cornstarch, and water or broth into a slurry. Pour this mixture into the wok with the vegetables.
Stir continuously for an additional 2-3 minutes until the potatoes are tender and coated with a sweet hoisin glaze.
Season with salt to taste if needed. Serve hot.
